# Ainika

> AI-Powered Products. Human-Centred Strategy.

Ainika is the consulting practice of Josen Joy — a Senior Product Owner, Business Analyst, and AI/ML strategist with over a decade of experience building AI/ML and SaaS products across fintech, enterprise automation, and digital transformation.

## About

- Founded by Josen Joy
- Based in Coventry, UK — available globally
- MSc Data Science & Computational Intelligence, Coventry University
- SAFe 5 Certified Product Owner / Product Manager
- 10+ years experience, 6 countries delivered, 350k+ users served

## Services

1. AI/ML Product Strategy & Roadmapping — turn data science capability into a product
2. Business Analysis & Requirements Engineering — precise requirements from discovery to acceptance criteria
3. Data Product Consulting — from raw data to a product people pay for
4. Fractional Product Owner — senior PO embedded in your team part-time

## Products & Projects

- TopListers (https://github.com/ainikaventures/toplisters) — privacy-first job market intelligence platform (in development). Track applications, submit anonymous job sightings, explore global hiring trends. Built with Python, FastAPI, React, Supabase.
- SplitAI (https://github.com/ainikaventures/splitai) — smart expense splitting app for iOS and Android. Built with Flutter/Dart and PHP.
- 2048 by Ainika (https://github.com/ainikaventures/2048) — reimagined 2048 puzzle game with custom tile icons, themes, and offline play. Built with Flutter/Dart.
